LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF CARSON SULLIVAN FOR ADMISSION PRO HAC VICE FOR DEFENDANTS HOST INTERNATIONAL, INC., MATTHEW LYSAKER AND RITA VENDERSON IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND THE APPLICANT HAS DEMONSTRATED THAT SHE IS ELIGIBLE TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE IN THIS ACTION. FURTHER, THE APPLICATION FEE OF $ 50.00 WAS SERVED ON THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
ORDER GRANTING APPLICATION TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR ATTORNEY CARSON H SULLIVAN FILED BY COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT HOST INTERNATIONAL, INC. LYSAKER, MATTHEW VENDERSON, RITA
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-14-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAY-13-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-12-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT VENDERSON, RITA
MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE - AMENDED FILED BY DEFENDANT HOST INTERNATIONAL, INC. LYSAKER, MATTHEW VENDERSON, RITA HEARING SET FOR AUG-14-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS HOST INTERNATIONAL, INC., MATTHEW LYSAKER, RITA VENDERSON'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF CARSON SULLIVAN FOR ADMISSION PRO HAC VICE FOR DEFENDANTS HOST INTERNATIONAL, INC., MATTHEW LYSAKER and RITA VENDERSON is Granted. No opposition filed, and the applicant has demonstrated that she is eligible to appear as counsel pro hac vice in this action. Further, the application fee of $ 50.00 was served on the State Bar of California. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
